addition.item: Added a configuration field in the manifest file to choose the correct menu item for the paths view.

change.item: Updated the template file to force the selected menu item ID for paths view links.

fix.item: Implemented AbstractModuleDispatcher logic for the dispatcher.
Added logic to exit early inside the dispatcher when no course display is needed instead of throwing enqueueMessage.
Removed the check inside the tmpl file for course display as this is now handled by the dispatcher.
Fixed the helper function method call to remove unused $params variable.
Changed the script file to use enqueueMessage instead of echo text.
Standardized the manifest file and corrected duplicate copyright tags.
Corrected the package name to TF Learn Path Module.

change.item:
Moved 
$params->get
calls inside the template file instead of the dispatcher.

Moved 
params->get
calls to the top of the tmpl file for clarity.
Updated namespaces in the service provider and manifest file.
Added Tech Fry copyright information to the manifest.
Added module-specific language strings and removed duplicated COM_TFLEARN module language strings.
Removed author URL from the manifest.
Updated sites configuration for Joomla! 5 and 6 support.

note.item: Simplified the target platform configuration for Joomla! update sites.

fix.item: Fixed helper file lesson retrieval so that all modules are displayed correctly.
Updated the helper file for compatibility with TF Learn 2.5.x and TF Library 2.9.x.

change.item: Blocked installation on Joomla! 4 because TF Learn versions after 2.4.4 are incompatible with Joomla! 4.
